g.text: Certification for physicians is governed by the American Board of Medical Specialties
oversees the certification of medical specialties and subspecialties
in addition to Family Medicine when the Family Medicine provider
has received additional certification in obstetrics and actively provides obstetrical care
satisfying the time and distance requirements for the
specialty types when they report an in
physician on their NA Template in all county type designation areas
Please see the corresponding note in the Physician
This is a special exception where CMS has chosen to give
to the awareness that Family Medicine physicians
often act as primary care providers
part of their Family Medicine practice
Dentists are certified by the American Dental Association’s
Recognition of Dental Specialties and Certifying Boards
are certified by organizations such as the American Nurses Credentialing
or the American Association of Nurse Practitioners
are certified by the National Commission on Certification of Physician Assistants
Allied health professionals are certified by a variety of organizations depending on their specialty
Examples of certifying boards include the Federation of State Boards of Physical Therapy
and the National Board for Certification in Occupational Therapy
Chiropractors are certified by state chiropractic boards under the guidance of
the National Board of Chiropractic Examiners
and podiatrists are certified by the American
These are examples of certifying organizations and are not an
specific boards within the American Board of Medical
such as the American Board of Surgery
or the American Board of Orthopedic

or up to two of the following surgical specialty types
with any other surgical specialty type
This corresponds to the NUCC code
Behavioral health providers are certified based on their specialty
include the National Board for Certified Counselors
Additional examples include the American Association for Marriage and Family Therapy
the National Association for Alcoholism and Drug Abuse
and the Behavior Analyst Certification Board
These are examples of certifying organizations and are not an exhaustive list
